meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer SaaS Starter Kit: Scale Faster with AI Tools
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Use this expert SaaS starter kit checklist to ship production-ready apps faster using Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: To stop struggling with project scalability, adopt a standardized SaaS starter kit. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature generation, you transform manual development into a repeatable, high-speed assembly line, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS products for clients in record time.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, another client deadline is looming, and your codebase looks like a house of cards. Every new project feels like starting from scratch, fighting the same configuration battles and architectural dead-ends. You’re trapped in a cycle of manual labor that kills your margins and keeps you from scaling your freelance business to an agency level.

But the era of the 'manual builder' is over. By deploying a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you reclaim your time and sanity. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a factory. We’re combining the architectural precision of Antigravity with the raw generative power of Claude Code to turn your development workflow into a predictable, scalable machine.

steps.title: Initialize the Standardized Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a base that includes authentication, database schema, and payment integration so you never configure boilerplate again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js SaaS scaffold with Supabase auth, Stripe subscription webhooks, and Tailwind CSS configuration.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Eliminate manual schema updates by letting AI handle the synchronization between your local environment and production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a migration generator script that monitors schema changes and outputs SQL files for Supabase migration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate migration for user roles and subscription tables"

steps.title: Modularize Component Library
steps.description: Build a reusable UI component library that adapts to client branding in minutes, not hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular component library based on Shadcn/UI that supports dynamic theme swapping via CSS variables.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent API Routing
steps.description: Standardize your backend logic to ensure every API endpoint follows the same error handling and validation patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a base API route handler with Zod validation, rate limiting, and structured JSON logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "refactor all existing routes to use the new standardized API handler"

steps.title: Deploy Continuous Integration Pipeline
steps.description: Automate your testing and deployment so you can ship features to production with a single command.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, type-checking, and unit tests before deploying to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "setup ci/cd pipeline for production environment"

pro_tips: Always define a 'Context File' in your root directory so Claude Code understands your project architecture before it starts suggesting changes.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation alongside your code; it keeps your clients informed without you writing a single line of manual text.
Standardize your environment variables across all projects to ensure your starter kit works identically on every client machine.
Treat your starter kit like a product; version control it separately and 'npm install' it into new projects to keep it updated.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your Auth flows first; it builds a safety net that allows you to move 3x faster on UI development.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is live, begin auditing your past projects to extract common patterns and fold them into your base repository.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start building at scale. Your time is your most valuable asset—stop wasting it on boilerplate. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
